sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check what RIGHT did
before = last_transition.before_frame.segmentation['nodes']
after = last_transition.after_frame.segmentation['nodes']

for n in before:
    if n['color'] == 'N':
        b = n['boundary']
        r = (min(p[0] for p in b), max(p[0] for p in b))
        c = (min(p[1] for p in b), max(p[1] for p in b))
        print(f"Before: N at rows={r}, cols={c}")

for n in after:
    if n['color'] == 'N':
        b = n['boundary']
        r = (min(p[0] for p in b), max(p[0] for p in b))
        c = (min(p[1] for p in b), max(p[1] for p in b))
        print(f"After: N at rows={r}, cols={c}")

# Check ascii diffs
ascii_before = last_transition.before_frame.ascii.split('\n')
ascii_after = last_transition.after_frame.ascii.split('\n')
diffs = []
for i, (lb, la) in enumerate(zip(ascii_before, ascii_after)):
    if lb != la:
        diffs.append((i, lb[:50], la[:50]))
print(f"Ascii diffs: {len(diffs)}")
for d in diffs[:10]:
    print(f"  row {d[0]}: {d[1][:30]} vs {d[2][:30]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
